buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all text-sm uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-300 hover:border-zinc-500 hover:text-white rounded-sm px-4 py-2 transition-all text-sm uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-900 rounded-sm px-3 py-1.5 transition-all text-sm

inputs.style: bg-black border border-zinc-800 rounded-sm px-3 py-2 text-sm text-white focus:border-green-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-green-500/20 placeholder:text-zinc-600 font-mono transition-all
inputs.label: text-xs font-mono text-zinc-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2 block

tabs.list: bg-zinc-900/50 p-1 border border-zinc-800 rounded-md inline-flex
tabs.trigger: data-[state=active]:bg-zinc-800 data-[state=active]:text-white text-zinc-400 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm text-sm font-medium transition-all

json_viewer.container: bg-[#050505] border border-zinc-800 rounded-sm p-4 overflow-x-auto max-h-[500px] font-mono text-xs

visual_enhancers.scanlines: pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[linear-gradient(rgba(18,16,16,0)_50%,rgba(0,0,0,0.25)_50%),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,0,0,0.06),rgba(0,255,0,0.02),rgba(0,0,255,0.06))] bg-[length:100%_2px,3px_100%] bg-repeat opacity-10

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text is at least 4.5:1 against background. Use #a1a1aa for lowest contrast text, never darker.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Space Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono via Google Fonts.
Override default shadcn radius to '0.125rem' (2px) or '0px' for that sharp terminal look.
Use the 'json_viewer' styles for the Request/Response panels.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid deep blacks.
Ensure the 'Generate FEA', 'Verify FEA', and 'Public Verify' views are distinct but share the same layout structure.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications with a dark, bordered style.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
